## Session Contribution

### Checklist

- [ ] File is named `YYYY-MM-DD-short-description.md` and placed in `sessions/`
- [ ] Frontmatter includes all required fields (title, date, author, status, tags)
- [ ] Status is set to `ready`
- [ ] Tags are from the approved list in `sessions/schema.yaml`
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or credentials included
- [ ] No personal or sensitive data included
- [ ] At least one step documented under "## Steps Taken"
- [ ] Key discoveries are documented

### Summary

Brief description of what this session covers:

### Claude Code Version

What version of Claude Code were you using?
